Question
========
Which statement is correct?

Answerlist
----------
* The mean is a measure of location.
* The mean is a measure of sample size.

Solution
========

Answerlist
----------
* True
* False

Meta-information
================
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10
exname: Description Tags Fixture
extags: description: Internal ILIAS description from extags.
expoints: 1
